# @scell/mcp-client — Scell.io MCP Server for LLMs

Version: 1.9.1
Author: QrCommunication / Scell.io
License: MIT
Node.js: >= 18.0.0
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@scell/mcp-client
GitHub: https://github.com/QrCommunication/scell-io-llm-agent
Total tools: 37

---

## What is this?

`@scell/mcp-client` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) configuration generator that connects AI assistants (Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code Copilot, and any other MCP-compatible client) to the Scell.io API. Once configured, the AI gains 37 tools covering electronic invoicing (Factur-X/UBL/CII), eIDAS electronic signatures, fiscal compliance mandated by French law LF 2026, credit note management, and partner onboarding via SuperPDP OAuth2.

The package itself does not run any server. It generates the JSON configuration that points the MCP client to the live MCP server hosted at `https://api.scell.io/api`. Tool definitions, request routing, and API calls all happen on that remote server.

---

## Architecture

```
Developer / LLM
       |
  MCP Client (Claude Desktop / Cursor / VS Code)
       |  reads
  JSON config (generated by @scell/mcp-client CLI)
       |  instructs client to spawn:
  npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-http https://api.scell.io/api
       |  HTTP transport
  Scell.io Live MCP Server (api.scell.io)
       |
  Scell.io REST API
```

Key points:
- `@scell/mcp-client` is a **config generator + TypeScript types library**. It does not implement the tools themselves.
- The live MCP server on `api.scell.io` exposes all 37 tools and handles every API call.
- The generated config uses `@modelcontextprotocol/server-http` as transport (spawned on-demand by the MCP client via `npx`).
- Authentication is passed as an environment variable (`X-Scell-API-Key` / `SCELL_API_KEY`) injected into the spawned process.

---

## Invoice & Credit Note Numbering (Important)

Invoice numbers and credit note numbers are **always server-generated**. Clients NEVER provide `invoice_number` or `credit_note_number` as input parameters.

**Invoice numbering:**
- Draft state: `DRAFT-{SLUG5}-{seq}` — e.g. `DRAFT-SCELL-00001`
- Submitted/sent state: `{SLUG5}-{YYYYMM}-{seq}` — e.g. `SCELL-202603-00001`

**Credit note numbering:**
- Draft state: `DRAFT-CN-{SLUG5}-{seq}` — e.g. `DRAFT-CN-SCELL-00001`
- Sent state: `CN-{SLUG5}-{YYYYMM}-{seq}` — e.g. `CN-SCELL-202603-00001`

Where `SLUG5` = first 5 characters of the tenant slug (uppercase). Sequences reset monthly per tenant.

The definitive fiscal number is assigned at submission/send time and is immutable per ISCA compliance rules.

---

## Quick Start

### For Claude Desktop

```bash
npx -y @scell/mcp-client claude tk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
```

This prints the JSON config to stdout. Paste it into your Claude Desktop config file and restart the app.

Write directly to the config file in one command (macOS):

```bash
npx -y @scell/mcp-client claude tk_live_xxx --output ~/Library/Application\ Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
```

### For Cursor

```bash
npx -y @scell/mcp-client cursor tk_live_xxx
```

Save output to `.cursor/mcp.json` (project-level) or `~/.cursor/mcp.json` (global), then restart Cursor.

### For VS Code

```bash
npx -y @scell/mcp-client vscode tk_live_xxx
```

Save output to `.vscode/mcp.json` in your project root, then restart VS Code.

### Generic (any MCP-compatible client)

```bash
npx -y @scell/mcp-client generic tk_live_xxx --base-url https://api.scell.io/api
```

---

## Configuration File Locations

| IDE / Client | Config file path |
|---|---|
| Claude Desktop (macOS) | `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` |
| Claude Desktop (Windows) | `%APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json` |
| Claude Desktop (Linux) | `~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` |
| Cursor (project) | `.cursor/mcp.json` |
| Cursor (global) | `~/.cursor/mcp.json` |
| VS Code (project) | `.vscode/mcp.json` |

---

## CLI Reference

```
scell-mcp <command> <api-key> [options]
```

### Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `claude <api-key>` | Generate Claude Desktop configuration |
| `cursor <api-key>` | Generate Cursor IDE configuration |
| `vscode <api-key>` | Generate VS Code configuration |
| `generic <api-key>` | Generate generic MCP configuration with inline tool comments |

### Options

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--base-url <url>` | Custom API base URL | `https://api.scell.io/api` |
| `--env <environment>` | Environment: `production`, `staging`, or `development` | (none) |
| `--sandbox` | Append `/sandbox` to base URL for sandbox mode | `false` |
| `--output <file>` | Write config to file instead of stdout | (none, prints to stdout) |
| `--help`, `-h` | Show help message | — |
| `--version`, `-v` | Show CLI version | — |

### Environment Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `SCELL_API_KEY` | Default API key — used when no key is passed as a CLI argument |
| `SCELL_BASE_URL` | Default base URL — overrides the built-in default |

### CLI Examples

```bash
# Generate Claude Desktop config and print to stdout
scell-mcp claude tk_live_your_api_key_here

# Generate Cursor config for staging environment
scell-mcp cursor tk_live_your_api_key_here --env staging

# Generate config with custom API base URL (e.g. staging instance)
scell-mcp cursor tk_live_your_api_key_here --base-url https://api.staging.scell.io/api

# Activate sandbox mode (routes requests to sandbox DB)
scell-mcp claude tk_test_your_api_key_here --sandbox

# Write directly to file
scell-mcp claude tk_live_your_api_key_here --output ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json

# Use environment variable for the API key
export SCELL_API_KEY=tk_live_your_api_key_here
scell-mcp claude
```

---

## Authentication

API keys are passed via the `X-Scell-API-Key` HTTP header (set automatically by the MCP server using the env variable injected by the generated config).

### API Key Prefixes

| Prefix | Type | Environment | Tool access |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tk_live_` | Tenant key | Production | All 37 tools (invoices, signatures, fiscal, credit notes) |
| `tk_test_` | Tenant key | Test/sandbox | All 37 tools, test environment |
| `sk_live_` | User/secret key | Production | Standard tools only (invoices, signatures, balance, validation) |
| `sk_test_` | User/secret key | Test/sandbox | Standard tools only, test environment |
| `pk_live_` | Publishable key | Production | Partner onboarding tools only |
| `pk_test_` | Publishable key | Test/sandbox | Partner onboarding tools only |

**Important rules:**
- Fiscal compliance tools (`scell_get_fiscal_compliance`, etc.) require a `tk_*` tenant key.
- Credit note tools (`scell_create_credit_note`, etc.) require a `tk_*` tenant key.
- Onboarding tools (`scell_onboarding_*`) require a `pk_*` publishable key.
- Standard tools (invoices, signatures, balance, SIRET/VAT validation, health check) accept any key type.

---

## Generated Configuration Structure

Standard config (any command):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "scell": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-http", "https://api.scell.io/api"],
      "env": {
        "X-Scell-API-Key": "tk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
        "SCELL_API_KEY": "tk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
        "SCELL_BASE_URL": "https://api.scell.io/api"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

With `--sandbox` flag:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "scell": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-http", "https://api.scell.io/api/sandbox"],
      "env": {
        "X-Scell-API-Key": "tk_test_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
        "SCELL_API_KEY": "tk_test_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
        "SCELL_BASE_URL": "https://api.scell.io/api/sandbox",
        "SCELL_SANDBOX": "true"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

With `--env staging`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "scell": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-http", "https://api.scell.io/api"],
      "env": {
        "X-Scell-API-Key": "tk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
        "SCELL_API_KEY": "tk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
        "SCELL_BASE_URL": "https://api.scell.io/api",
        "SCELL_ENVIRONMENT": "staging"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

---

## Tools Reference — All 37 Tools

### Summary Table

| # | Tool | Category | Auth |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `scell_health_check` | Health | any |
| 2 | `scell_validate_api_key` | Health | any |
| 3 | `scell_create_invoice` | Invoicing | any |
| 4 | `scell_get_invoice` | Invoicing | any |
| 5 | `scell_list_invoices` | Invoicing | any |
| 6 | `scell_download_invoice` | Invoicing | any |
| 7 | `scell_create_signature` | Signatures | any |
| 8 | `scell_get_signature` | Signatures | any |
| 9 | `scell_list_signatures` | Signatures | any |
| 10 | `scell_download_signed` | Signatures | any |
| 11 | `scell_cancel_signature` | Signatures | any |
| 12 | `scell_send_reminder` | Signatures | any |
| 13 | `scell_get_balance` | Account | any |
| 14 | `scell_validate_siret` | Account | any |
| 15 | `scell_validate_vat` | Account | any |
| 16 | `scell_get_audit_trail` | Account | any |
| 17 | `scell_get_fiscal_compliance` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 18 | `scell_check_fiscal_integrity` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 19 | `scell_list_fiscal_closings` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 20 | `scell_get_fiscal_attestation` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 21 | `scell_list_fiscal_entries` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 22 | `scell_get_kill_switch_status` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 23 | `scell_list_fiscal_rules` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 24 | `scell_download_measures_register` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 25 | `scell_download_technical_dossier` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 26 | `scell_download_self_attestation` | Fiscal | `tk_*` |
| 27 | `scell_list_credit_notes` | Credit Notes | `tk_*` |
| 28 | `scell_get_credit_note` | Credit Notes | `tk_*` |
| 29 | `scell_download_credit_note` | Credit Notes | `tk_*` |
| 30 | `scell_create_credit_note` | Credit Notes | `tk_*` |
| 31 | `scell_send_credit_note` | Credit Notes | `tk_*` |
| 32 | `scell_delete_credit_note` | Credit Notes | `tk_*` |
| 33 | `scell_get_remaining_creditable` | Credit Notes | `tk_*` |
| 34 | `scell_onboarding_create_session` | Onboarding | `pk_*` |
| 35 | `scell_onboarding_get_session` | Onboarding | `pk_*` |
| 36 | `scell_onboarding_superpdp_authorize` | Onboarding | `pk_*` |
| 37 | `scell_onboarding_superpdp_callback` | Onboarding | `pk_*` |

---

### Health & Authentication (2)

---

#### scell_health_check

**Description:** Check the health status of the Scell.io API and all its services (database, cache, queue, signature, invoicing). Use this to verify connectivity before performing operations.

**Auth:** any key type (or no key — public endpoint)

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/health`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:**

```typescript
HealthCheckResponse {
  status: 'healthy' | 'degraded' | 'unhealthy';
  version: string;        // API version string
  services: {
    database: boolean;    // PostgreSQL reachable
    cache: boolean;       // Redis reachable
    queue: boolean;       // Horizon queue running
    signature: boolean;   // OpenAPI.com signature service reachable
    invoicing: boolean;   // SuperPDP invoicing service reachable
  };
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "version": "2.1.0",
  "services": {
    "database": true,
    "cache": true,
    "queue": true,
    "signature": true,
    "invoicing": true
  }
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Is the Scell.io API up?"
- "Check if all Scell services are running."
- "Is the signature service available right now?"

---

#### scell_validate_api_key

**Description:** Validate the currently configured API key. Returns tenant information, permission list, and current rate-limit state.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/validate-key` (or equivalent auth check endpoint)

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:**

```typescript
ApiKeyValidationResponse {
  valid: boolean;
  tenant?: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    plan: string;   // e.g. "starter", "pro", "enterprise"
  };
  permissions?: string[];   // e.g. ["invoices:write", "signatures:write", "fiscal:read"]
  rateLimit?: {
    limit: number;      // requests allowed per period
    remaining: number;  // requests remaining in current window
    reset: string;      // ISO 8601 timestamp when window resets
  };
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "valid": true,
  "tenant": {
    "id": "ten_abc123",
    "name": "Acme SAS",
    "plan": "pro"
  },
  "permissions": ["invoices:write", "invoices:read", "signatures:write", "fiscal:read"],
  "rateLimit": {
    "limit": 1000,
    "remaining": 987,
    "reset": "2026-04-07T15:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Is my API key valid?"
- "What permissions does my API key have?"
- "How many API requests do I have left?"

---

### Electronic Invoicing (4)

---

#### scell_create_invoice

**Description:** Create a new electronic invoice in Factur-X, UBL, or CII format. The invoice number is **server-generated** — never pass it as a parameter. The invoice goes through two stages: `draft` (temporary number like `DRAFT-SCELL-00001`) and `submitted`/`sent` (definitive fiscal number like `SCELL-202604-00001`).

Identifier requirements per party nationality:
- French company (`country=FR`): `siret` is required (14-digit SIRET)
- EU company (non-FR): provide `vatNumber` (e.g. `BE0123456789`, `DE123456789`)
- Non-EU company: provide `legal_id` + `legal_id_scheme` (e.g. `legal_id: "12-3456789"`, `legal_id_scheme: "US:EIN"`)

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/invoices`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `invoiceDate` | `string` | Invoice date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. `"2026-04-07"`) |
| `dueDate` | `string` | Payment due date in ISO 8601 format |
| `seller` | `Company` | Seller/supplier information (see Company type) |
| `buyer` | `Company` | Buyer/customer information (see Company type) |
| `lines` | `InvoiceLine[]` | Array of invoice line items (at least 1) |

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `currency` | `string` | `"EUR"` | ISO 4217 currency code |
| `format` | `"factur-x"` \| `"ubl"` \| `"cii"` | `"factur-x"` | Output format |
| `notes` | `string` | — | Free-text notes appended to the invoice |
| `purchaseOrderRef` | `string` | — | Purchase order reference number |
| `paymentTerms` | `string` | — | Payment terms text (e.g. `"Net 30"`) |

**Company type:**

```typescript
{
  name: string;               // Company legal name
  siret?: string;             // 14-digit SIRET — required only for country=FR
  vatNumber?: string;         // EU VAT number (e.g. FR12345678901, BE0123456789)
  legal_id?: string;          // Non-EU legal identifier (e.g. "12-3456789")
  legal_id_scheme?: string;   // Non-EU scheme code (e.g. "US:EIN", "GB:CRN")
  address: string;            // Street address line
  postalCode: string;         // Postal / ZIP code
  city: string;               // City
  country: string;            // ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (FR, BE, DE, GB, US, ...)
  email?: string;             // Contact email
  phone?: string;             // Contact phone
}
```

**InvoiceLine type:**

```typescript
{
  description: string;    // Line item description
  quantity: number;       // Quantity
  unitPrice: number;      // Unit price excluding tax
  vatRate: number;        // VAT rate as percentage (e.g. 20 for 20%)
  unit?: string;          // Unit of measure (e.g. "hour", "day", "unit")
  productCode?: string;   // Product or service reference code
}
```

**Returns:** `Invoice` object

```typescript
Invoice {
  id: string;
  invoiceNumber: string;    // Server-generated (e.g. "SCELL-202604-00001")
  status: 'draft' | 'pending' | 'sent' | 'paid' | 'cancelled' | 'disputed';
  totalExcludingTax: number;
  totalVat: number;
  totalIncludingTax: number;
  currency: string;
  format: string;
  downloadUrl?: string;
  paidAt?: string;
  paymentReference?: string;
  paymentNote?: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "id": "inv_01HXYZ",
  "invoiceNumber": "DRAFT-SCELL-00001",
  "status": "draft",
  "totalExcludingTax": 1500.00,
  "totalVat": 300.00,
  "totalIncludingTax": 1800.00,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "format": "factur-x",
  "downloadUrl": "https://api.scell.io/api/invoices/inv_01HXYZ/download",
  "createdAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Create an invoice for Acme Corp, SIRET 12345678901234, for consulting services: 10 hours at 150 EUR/hour, 20% VAT, due in 30 days."
- "Create a Factur-X invoice for a Belgian client ACME SPRL with VAT number BE0123456789, 15 Avenue Louise 1050 Bruxelles Belgium, for 5 days of software development at 800 EUR/day."
- "Invoice Client UK Ltd, CRN 12345678, 10 Downing Street London SW1A 2AA UK, for 3 support days at 600 EUR/day with 0% VAT."
- "Create a UBL invoice for our German partner Deutsche GmbH, VAT DE123456789, for product delivery: 50 units at 40 EUR each at 19% VAT."

---

#### scell_get_invoice

**Description:** Retrieve full details of an existing invoice by its ID, including status, totals, format, and download URL.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/invoices/{id}`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Invoice ID (e.g. `"inv_01HXYZ"`) |

**Returns:** `Invoice` object (see `scell_create_invoice` response shape)

**Example prompts:**
- "Get the details of invoice inv_01HXYZ."
- "What is the status of invoice SCELL-202604-00001?"
- "Show me invoice inv_abc123 — is it paid?"

---

#### scell_list_invoices

**Description:** List invoices with optional filtering by status and date range. Supports pagination.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/invoices`

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | `string` | Filter by status: `draft`, `pending`, `sent`, `paid`, `cancelled`, `disputed` |
| `from` | `string` | Start date filter (ISO 8601) |
| `to` | `string` | End date filter (ISO 8601) |
| `page` | `number` | Page number (default: 1) |
| `perPage` | `number` | Items per page (default: 20, max: 100) |

**Returns:** `PaginatedResult<Invoice>`

```json
{
  "items": [...],
  "total": 42,
  "page": 1,
  "perPage": 20,
  "totalPages": 3
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "List all unpaid invoices."
- "Show me all invoices from last month."
- "List invoices with status 'sent' created between 2026-01-01 and 2026-03-31."
- "How many invoices do I have in draft status?"

---

#### scell_download_invoice

**Description:** Download an invoice file as PDF or XML (Factur-X embeds the XML in the PDF).

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/invoices/{id}/download`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Invoice ID |
| `format` | `"pdf"` \| `"xml"` | Desired download format |

**Returns:** Binary file content (PDF or XML)

**Example prompts:**
- "Download invoice inv_01HXYZ as PDF."
- "Get the XML version of invoice SCELL-202604-00001."
- "Download the Factur-X PDF for invoice inv_abc123."

---

### Electronic Signatures (6)

---

#### scell_create_signature

**Description:** Create a new eIDAS electronic signature request for a document. The document must be provided as a base64-encoded string. Supports Simple (SES), Advanced (AES), and Qualified (QES) electronic signatures. Signers receive an email invitation and can sign via the hosted Scell.io signing page.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/signatures`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `document` | `string` | Base64-encoded document content |
| `filename` | `string` | Document filename with extension (e.g. `"contract.pdf"`) |
| `mimeType` | `string` | MIME type (e.g. `"application/pdf"`) |
| `signers` | `Signer[]` | Array of signers (at least 1) |

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `signatureType` | `"simple"` \| `"advanced"` \| `"qualified"` | `"simple"` | Signature type |
| `signatureLevel` | `"SES"` \| `"AES"` \| `"QES"` | `"SES"` | eIDAS level |
| `expiresAt` | `string` | — | Expiration date (ISO 8601) |
| `emailSubject` | `string` | — | Custom email subject for invitation |
| `emailMessage` | `string` | — | Custom message body in invitation email |
| `webhookUrl` | `string` | — | URL to receive status webhook callbacks |
| `redirectUrl` | `string` | — | URL to redirect signer after signing |

**Signer type:**

```typescript
{
  name: string;     // Signer's full name
  email: string;    // Signer's email address
  phone?: string;   // Phone number for SMS OTP authentication (optional)
  order?: number;   // Signing order for sequential workflows (1, 2, 3, ...)
  role?: string;    // Signer's role / title (e.g. "CEO", "Legal Representative")
}
```

**Returns:** `SignatureRequest` object

```typescript
SignatureRequest {
  id: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed' | 'expired' | 'cancelled';
  filename: string;
  signers: Array<{
    name: string;
    email: string;
    phone?: string;
    order?: number;
    role?: string;
    status: 'pending' | 'signed' | 'declined';
    signedAt?: string;
  }>;
  signingUrl?: string;    // Hosted signing page URL
  downloadUrl?: string;   // Available once status is "completed"
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  expiresAt?: string;
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "id": "sig_01HABC",
  "status": "pending",
  "filename": "contrat_prestation.pdf",
  "signers": [
    {
      "name": "John Doe",
      "email": "john.doe@example.com",
      "status": "pending"
    }
  ],
  "signingUrl": "https://sign.scell.io/s/abc123",
  "createdAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z",
  "expiresAt": "2026-05-07T10:00:00Z"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Create a signature request for the attached contract. Send to john.doe@example.com for signature."
- "Send this NDA to both alice@company.com and bob@company.com for sequential signing — Alice signs first, then Bob."
- "Create a signature request with SMS OTP for signer Marie Dupont, email marie@dupont.fr, phone +33612345678."
- "Create an AES-level signature request expiring in 7 days for this service agreement."

---

#### scell_get_signature

**Description:** Get full details and current status of a signature request, including each signer's status and timestamps.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/signatures/{id}`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Signature request ID (e.g. `"sig_01HABC"`) |

**Returns:** `SignatureRequest` object (see `scell_create_signature`)

**Example prompts:**
- "Check the status of signature request sig_01HABC."
- "Has John Doe signed the contract yet?"
- "Show me all signers for request sig_xyz and their signing status."

---

#### scell_list_signatures

**Description:** List all signature requests with optional status filter and pagination.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/signatures`

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | `string` | Filter: `draft`, `pending`, `in_progress`, `completed`, `expired`, `cancelled` |
| `page` | `number` | Page number (default: 1) |
| `perPage` | `number` | Items per page (default: 20, max: 100) |

**Returns:** `PaginatedResult<SignatureRequest>`

**Example prompts:**
- "List all pending signature requests."
- "Show me completed signature requests from the last 30 days."
- "How many signature requests are currently in progress?"

---

#### scell_download_signed

**Description:** Download the signed document once the signature request status is `completed`. Returns the signed PDF with embedded signature metadata.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/signatures/{id}/download`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Signature request ID |

**Returns:** Binary PDF content (signed document)

**Example prompts:**
- "Download the signed contract for request sig_01HABC."
- "Get the signed PDF for signature sig_xyz."

---

#### scell_cancel_signature

**Description:** Cancel a pending or in-progress signature request. Signers will be notified. Only requests in `pending` or `in_progress` status can be cancelled.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `DELETE /api/signatures/{id}` or `POST /api/signatures/{id}/cancel`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Signature request ID |

**Returns:** Updated `SignatureRequest` with `status: "cancelled"`

**Example prompts:**
- "Cancel signature request sig_01HABC."
- "Cancel all pending signature requests for the contract I sent last week."

---

#### scell_send_reminder

**Description:** Send an email reminder to all signers who have not yet signed on a pending or in-progress signature request.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/signatures/{id}/remind`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Signature request ID |

**Returns:** Confirmation object

**Example prompts:**
- "Send a reminder for signature request sig_01HABC."
- "Remind all pending signers for request sig_xyz."
- "Send a follow-up to everyone who hasn't signed yet on sig_abc."

---

### Account & Validation (4)

---

#### scell_get_balance

**Description:** Get the current account credit balance and currency for the authenticated tenant.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/balance`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:**

```typescript
TenantBalance {
  credits: number;    // Available credit balance
  currency: string;   // Currency code (e.g. "EUR")
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "credits": 150.00,
  "currency": "EUR"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "What is my current credit balance?"
- "How many credits do I have left on my Scell account?"

---

#### scell_validate_siret

**Description:** Validate a French SIRET number (14 digits) against official government registries (INSEE). Returns whether the SIRET is valid, active, and associated with a known legal entity.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/validate/siret`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `siret` | `string` | 14-digit SIRET number |

**Returns:**

```json
{
  "valid": true,
  "active": true,
  "company": {
    "name": "Acme SAS",
    "siret": "12345678901234",
    "siren": "123456789",
    "naf": "6201Z",
    "address": "10 Rue de la Paix, 75001 Paris"
  }
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Is SIRET 12345678901234 valid?"
- "Check if this SIRET is active: 33224172400123."
- "Validate the SIRET 79975926700018 before creating an invoice."

---

#### scell_validate_vat

**Description:** Validate a European VAT number using the VIES (VAT Information Exchange System) service. Works for all EU member states.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/validate/vat`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `vatNumber` | `string` | Full EU VAT number including country prefix (e.g. `"BE0123456789"`, `"FR12345678901"`, `"DE123456789"`) |

**Returns:**

```json
{
  "valid": true,
  "countryCode": "BE",
  "vatNumber": "0123456789",
  "name": "Entreprise Belge SPRL",
  "address": "15 Avenue Louise, 1050 Bruxelles"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Validate VAT number BE0123456789."
- "Is FR12345678901 a valid French VAT number?"
- "Check the EU VAT for DE123456789 before invoicing."

---

#### scell_get_audit_trail

**Description:** Retrieve the complete audit trail for a document (invoice or signed document). The audit trail includes all events: creation, status changes, signatures, downloads, and fiscal anchoring timestamps.

**Auth:** any key type

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/audit-trail/{documentId}`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `documentId` | `string` | Invoice ID or Signature Request ID |

**Returns:**

```json
{
  "documentId": "inv_01HXYZ",
  "events": [
    {
      "event": "created",
      "timestamp": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z",
      "actor": "api_key:tk_live_xxx"
    },
    {
      "event": "submitted",
      "timestamp": "2026-04-07T10:05:00Z",
      "actor": "api_key:tk_live_xxx"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Get the audit trail for invoice inv_01HXYZ."
- "Show me all events for signature request sig_abc123."
- "When was this invoice submitted and by whom?"

---

### Fiscal Compliance — ISCA (10) — requires `tk_*` tenant key

These 10 tools expose the ISCA (Infrastracture de Séquençage Chronologique et d'Archivage) fiscal compliance layer mandated by French law LF 2026. They require a tenant API key (`tk_live_*` or `tk_test_*`). Using a user key (`sk_*`) will return a 403 Forbidden error.

The ISCA system maintains:
- An immutable fiscal ledger with SHA-256 hash chaining
- Daily closings with debit/credit summaries
- TSA anchoring per RFC 3161
- FEC export capability for French tax authorities
- An emergency kill-switch

---

#### scell_get_fiscal_compliance

**Description:** Get the ISCA fiscal compliance dashboard. Returns the overall compliance status (`CONFORME`, `ALERTE`, or `NON_CONFORME`), closing coverage percentage, hash chain integrity percentage, open incident count, and key timestamps.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/compliance`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:** `FiscalComplianceData`

```typescript
FiscalComplianceData {
  closingCoveragePercent: number;     // % of business days with a closing
  chainIntegrityPercent: number;      // % of entries with valid hash chain
  openIncidentsCount: number;         // Number of unresolved fiscal incidents
  overallStatus: 'CONFORME' | 'ALERTE' | 'NON_CONFORME';
  lastIntegrityCheckAt: string | null;
  lastClosingAt: string | null;
  lastClosingDate: string | null;
  totalFiscalEntries: number;
  daysWithActivity: number;
  daysClosed: number;
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "closingCoveragePercent": 100,
  "chainIntegrityPercent": 100,
  "openIncidentsCount": 0,
  "overallStatus": "CONFORME",
  "lastIntegrityCheckAt": "2026-04-07T02:00:00Z",
  "lastClosingAt": "2026-04-06T23:59:59Z",
  "lastClosingDate": "2026-04-06",
  "totalFiscalEntries": 1248,
  "daysWithActivity": 62,
  "daysClosed": 62
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Show me the fiscal compliance status for my company."
- "Is my fiscal system CONFORME?"
- "What is the ISCA compliance dashboard?"

---

#### scell_check_fiscal_integrity

**Description:** Verify the integrity of the SHA-256 hash chain in the fiscal ledger. Each fiscal entry contains a `dataHash`, `previousHash`, and `chainHash`. This tool checks that every link in the chain is unbroken. Essential for ISCA compliance audits.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/fiscal/integrity-check`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:** `FiscalIntegrityReport`

```typescript
FiscalIntegrityReport {
  isValid: boolean;
  entriesChecked: number;
  brokenLinks: number;
  details?: Record<string, unknown>;
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "isValid": true,
  "entriesChecked": 1248,
  "brokenLinks": 0,
  "details": {}
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Check the integrity of the fiscal hash chain."
- "Verify the ISCA ledger integrity."
- "Are there any broken links in the fiscal chain?"

---

#### scell_list_fiscal_closings

**Description:** List recent fiscal daily closings. Each closing captures the total debit/credit amounts for the day, the number of fiscal entries, and the closing's chain hash. Daily closings are mandatory under French LF 2026.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/closings`

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `page` | `number` | Page number |
| `perPage` | `number` | Items per page |
| `from` | `string` | Start date filter (ISO 8601) |
| `to` | `string` | End date filter (ISO 8601) |

**Returns:** `PaginatedResult<FiscalClosing>`

```typescript
FiscalClosing {
  id: string;
  closingDate: string;      // Date of the closing (YYYY-MM-DD)
  closingType: string;      // "daily", "monthly", etc.
  status: string;           // "completed", "pending", etc.
  entriesCount: number;
  totalDebit: number;
  totalCredit: number;
  chainHash?: string;       // SHA-256 chain hash at closing
  environment?: string;     // "production" or "sandbox"
  createdAt?: string;
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "clo_abc",
      "closingDate": "2026-04-06",
      "closingType": "daily",
      "status": "completed",
      "entriesCount": 18,
      "totalDebit": 12400.00,
      "totalCredit": 0.00,
      "chainHash": "abc123def456...",
      "environment": "production",
      "createdAt": "2026-04-06T23:59:59Z"
    }
  ],
  "total": 62,
  "page": 1,
  "perPage": 20,
  "totalPages": 4
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "List the last 10 daily fiscal closings."
- "Show me all fiscal closings for March 2026."
- "Were there any missing daily closings last month?"

---

#### scell_get_fiscal_attestation

**Description:** Generate an annual fiscal compliance attestation (ISCA certificate) for a specific year. The attestation summarizes the tenant's compliance status, software version, and fiscal metrics for the year. Required for annual tax declarations.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/attestation/{year}`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `year` | `number` | Tax year (e.g. `2025`, `2026`) |

**Returns:** `FiscalAttestation`

```typescript
FiscalAttestation {
  year: number;
  tenantName: string;
  softwareVersion: string;
  compliance: Record<string, unknown>;  // Detailed compliance metrics
  generatedAt?: string;
  certificateHash?: string;             // SHA-256 hash of the attestation
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "year": 2025,
  "tenantName": "Acme SAS",
  "softwareVersion": "2.1.0",
  "compliance": {
    "closingCoverage": 100,
    "chainIntegrity": 100,
    "incidents": 0
  },
  "generatedAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z",
  "certificateHash": "sha256_abc..."
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Generate a fiscal attestation for year 2025."
- "Get the ISCA compliance certificate for my 2026 activity."

---

#### scell_list_fiscal_entries

**Description:** List immutable fiscal ledger entries. Each entry represents a financial event (invoice creation, payment, credit note) and contains its position in the SHA-256 hash chain. Supports filtering by date range, entry type, and entity type.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/entries`

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `from` | `string` | Start date filter (ISO 8601) |
| `to` | `string` | End date filter (ISO 8601) |
| `entryType` | `string` | Filter by entry type |
| `entityType` | `string` | Filter by entity type (e.g. `"invoice"`, `"credit_note"`) |
| `page` | `number` | Page number |
| `perPage` | `number` | Items per page |

**Returns:** `PaginatedResult<FiscalEntry>`

```typescript
FiscalEntry {
  id: string;
  sequenceNumber: number;      // Monotonic sequence number
  entryType: string;
  fiscalDate: string;
  entityType?: string | null;  // e.g. "invoice", "credit_note"
  entityId?: string | null;    // ID of the linked entity
  dataHash?: string;           // SHA-256 hash of the entry data
  previousHash?: string;       // Hash of the preceding entry
  chainHash?: string;          // Combined chain hash
  environment?: string;
  legalStatus?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "List all fiscal entries for March 2026."
- "Show me the last 20 fiscal ledger entries."
- "List fiscal entries of type 'invoice' for Q1 2026."

---

#### scell_get_kill_switch_status

**Description:** Check whether the fiscal emergency kill-switch is currently active. When active, the kill-switch halts all fiscal operations (invoice creation, daily closings). Returns who activated it, when, and the reason.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/kill-switch`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:** `FiscalKillSwitchStatus`

```typescript
FiscalKillSwitchStatus {
  isActive: boolean;
  killSwitch: {
    id: string;
    isActive: boolean;
    activatedAt: string;
    reason: string;
    activatedBy: string;
    deactivatedAt?: string | null;
    deactivatedBy?: string | null;
  } | null;    // null if kill-switch has never been activated
}
```

**Example responses:**

Normal state:
```json
{
  "isActive": false,
  "killSwitch": null
}
```

Active kill-switch:
```json
{
  "isActive": true,
  "killSwitch": {
    "id": "ks_001",
    "isActive": true,
    "activatedAt": "2026-04-07T09:00:00Z",
    "reason": "Security audit in progress",
    "activatedBy": "admin@scell.io",
    "deactivatedAt": null,
    "deactivatedBy": null
  }
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Is the fiscal kill-switch currently active?"
- "Check the kill-switch status before processing invoices."
- "Why was the kill-switch activated?"

---

#### scell_list_fiscal_rules

**Description:** List all applicable fiscal rules configured in the system. Rules govern VAT rates, invoicing constraints, credit note policies, closing procedures, and FEC export requirements. Each rule includes its legal reference, effective dates, and current active status.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/rules`

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `category` | `"vat"` \| `"invoicing"` \| `"credit_note"` \| `"closing"` \| `"export"` | Filter by rule category |
| `active` | `boolean` | Filter to only active or inactive rules |

**Returns:** `FiscalRule[]`

```typescript
FiscalRule {
  id: string;
  ruleKey: string;         // Unique rule identifier (e.g. "vat.standard_rate.fr")
  name: string;
  category: 'vat' | 'invoicing' | 'credit_note' | 'closing' | 'export';
  ruleDefinition: Record<string, unknown>;
  version: number;
  effectiveFrom: string;   // ISO 8601 date
  effectiveUntil?: string | null;
  legalReference?: string | null;  // French law article reference
  description?: string | null;
  isActive: boolean;
  createdAt?: string;
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "List all active fiscal rules."
- "What are the VAT rate rules currently in effect?"
- "Show me fiscal rules related to credit notes."

---

#### scell_download_measures_register

**Description:** Download the ISCA measures register as a PDF document. This register documents all technical and organizational measures taken to ensure fiscal data integrity. Required for ISCA compliance dossiers.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/isca/measures-register`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:** `ISCADocument`

```typescript
ISCADocument {
  filename: string;          // e.g. "registre-mesures-isca-2026.pdf"
  content: ArrayBuffer;      // PDF binary content
  generated_at: string;      // ISO 8601 generation timestamp
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Download the ISCA measures register."
- "Get the PDF of the measures register for our fiscal dossier."

---

#### scell_download_technical_dossier

**Description:** Download the ISCA technical dossier as a PDF document. This dossier describes the technical architecture, hash chain algorithm, storage mechanisms, and security controls of the fiscal system. Required for auditor submissions.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/isca/technical-dossier`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:** `ISCADocument` (see `scell_download_measures_register`)

**Example prompts:**
- "Download the ISCA technical dossier."
- "Get the technical documentation PDF for our fiscal audit."

---

#### scell_download_self_attestation

**Description:** Download the ISCA self-attestation certificate as a PDF. The self-attestation is a signed declaration that the software meets LF 2026 fiscal compliance requirements. Required for onboarding with French tax authorities.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/fiscal/isca/self-attestation`

**Parameters:** none

**Returns:** `ISCADocument` (see `scell_download_measures_register`)

**Example prompts:**
- "Download the ISCA self-attestation PDF."
- "Get the NF525/ISCA certification document."

---

### Credit Notes (7) — requires `tk_*` tenant key

Credit notes (avoirs in French) are linked to existing invoices. All 7 tools require a tenant API key (`tk_*`). Credit notes follow the same immutable numbering as invoices (server-generated, DRAFT prefix until sent).

---

#### scell_list_credit_notes

**Description:** List credit notes with optional filtering by status and pagination.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/credit-notes`

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | `"draft"` \| `"sent"` \| `"cancelled"` | Filter by status |
| `invoiceId` | `string` | Filter to credit notes for a specific invoice |
| `page` | `number` | Page number |
| `perPage` | `number` | Items per page |

**Returns:** `PaginatedResult<CreditNote>`

**Example prompts:**
- "List all draft credit notes."
- "Show me sent credit notes from March 2026."
- "List all credit notes linked to invoice inv_01HXYZ."

---

#### scell_get_credit_note

**Description:** Get full details of a credit note, including all line items, amounts, linked invoice, and current status.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/credit-notes/{id}`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Credit note ID |

**Returns:** `CreditNote`

```typescript
CreditNote {
  id: string;
  creditNoteNumber: string;   // Server-generated (e.g. "CN-SCELL-202604-00001")
  invoiceId: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'sent' | 'cancelled';
  type: 'partial' | 'total';
  reason: string;
  subtotal: number;
  taxAmount: number;
  total: number;
  currency: string;
  issueDate: string;
  items?: CreditNoteLine[];
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Get the details of credit note cn_abc123."
- "Show me credit note CN-SCELL-202604-00001."

---

#### scell_download_credit_note

**Description:** Download a credit note as a PDF document.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/credit-notes/{id}/download`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Credit note ID |

**Returns:** Binary PDF content

**Example prompts:**
- "Download credit note cn_abc123 as PDF."
- "Get the PDF for avoir CN-SCELL-202604-00001."

---

#### scell_create_credit_note

**Description:** Create a credit note (total or partial) from an existing invoice. For a total credit note, the entire invoice amount is credited. For a partial credit note, specify which invoice line items and quantities to credit. Credit notes created are initially in `draft` status.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/credit-notes`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `invoiceId` | `string` | ID of the invoice to credit |
| `reason` | `string` | Reason for the credit note (e.g. `"duplicate billing"`, `"damaged goods"`) |
| `type` | `"total"` \| `"partial"` | Type of credit note |

**Optional parameters (for partial credit notes):**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `items` | `Array<{invoiceLineId: string, quantity?: number}>` | Invoice lines to credit (for `type: "partial"`) |

**Returns:** `CreditNote` with `status: "draft"`

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "id": "cn_01HXYZ",
  "creditNoteNumber": "DRAFT-CN-SCELL-00001",
  "invoiceId": "inv_01HABC",
  "status": "draft",
  "type": "total",
  "reason": "duplicate billing",
  "subtotal": 1500.00,
  "taxAmount": 300.00,
  "total": 1800.00,
  "currency": "EUR",
  "issueDate": "2026-04-07",
  "createdAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Create a total credit note for invoice inv_01HXYZ because of duplicate billing."
- "Create a partial credit note on invoice INV-2026-00042 for 3 units of line item line_abc (damaged goods)."
- "Issue a credit note to cancel invoice SCELL-202603-00015 — client requested refund."

---

#### scell_send_credit_note

**Description:** Validate and send a draft credit note. This action changes the status from `draft` to `sent`, assigns the definitive fiscal number (e.g. `CN-SCELL-202604-00001`), and notifies the buyer. This action is irreversible per fiscal compliance rules.

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `POST /api/credit-notes/{id}/send`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Credit note ID (must be in `draft` status) |

**Returns:** Updated `CreditNote` with `status: "sent"` and definitive `creditNoteNumber`

**Example prompts:**
- "Send credit note cn_01HXYZ to the buyer."
- "Validate and send draft credit note DRAFT-CN-SCELL-00001."

---

#### scell_delete_credit_note

**Description:** Delete a draft credit note. Only credit notes in `draft` status can be deleted. Sent or cancelled credit notes cannot be deleted (fiscal immutability constraint).

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `DELETE /api/credit-notes/{id}`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `string` | Credit note ID (must be in `draft` status) |

**Returns:** Confirmation of deletion

**Example prompts:**
- "Delete draft credit note cn_01HXYZ."
- "Remove the credit note I accidentally created for invoice inv_abc."

---

#### scell_get_remaining_creditable

**Description:** Calculate how much can still be credited on a specific invoice. Returns the original invoice total minus all amounts already covered by existing credit notes (excluding cancelled ones).

**Auth:** `tk_*` tenant key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /api/invoices/{invoiceId}/remaining-creditable`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `invoiceId` | `string` | Invoice ID |

**Returns:**

```json
{
  "invoiceId": "inv_01HXYZ",
  "invoiceTotal": 1800.00,
  "alreadyCredited": 360.00,
  "remainingCreditable": 1440.00,
  "currency": "EUR"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "How much can still be credited on invoice inv_01HXYZ?"
- "What is the remaining creditable amount on invoice SCELL-202603-00015?"
- "I want to issue a partial credit note — how much has already been credited on invoice inv_abc?"

---

### Partner Onboarding (4) — requires `pk_*` publishable key

These 4 tools implement the SuperPDP OAuth2 Authorization Code flow for partner-driven tenant onboarding. Partners use these tools to enroll end-users through SuperPDP, which handles company registration (KYB), identity verification, and authorization. On successful enrollment, Scell automatically provisions a tenant account.

**Flow overview:**
1. Partner calls `scell_onboarding_create_session` → gets a `session_id`
2. Partner calls `scell_onboarding_superpdp_authorize` with `session_id` → gets `authorize_url` + `state`
3. Partner opens `authorize_url` in a popup → SuperPDP handles signup, KYB, identity verification
4. SuperPDP redirects to partner callback URL with `code` + `state`
5. Partner calls `scell_onboarding_superpdp_callback` with `session_id`, `code`, `state` → gets tenant
6. Partner can poll `scell_onboarding_get_session` to check status

**Auth:** `pk_*` publishable key required for all onboarding tools

---

#### scell_onboarding_create_session

**Description:** Create a new onboarding session for an end-user. Returns a `session_id` that tracks the onboarding flow from start to completion.

**Auth:** `pk_*` publishable key required

**Endpoint:** `POST /onboarding/sessions`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `partner_ref` | `string` | Partner's external reference for the user (e.g. CRM ID, user ID) |

**Optional parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `metadata` | `Record<string, unknown>` | Arbitrary metadata to attach to the session |

**Returns:** `OnboardingSession`

```typescript
OnboardingSession {
  id: string;               // Session ID (e.g. "sess_01HXYZ")
  status: 'pending' | 'authorized' | 'completed' | 'failed';
  tenant?: TenantProfile;   // Populated once onboarding completes
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "id": "sess_01HXYZ",
  "status": "pending",
  "tenant": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-07T10:00:00Z"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Start an onboarding session for new partner user with external ID 'crm_user_42'."
- "Create an onboarding session for my client before sending them the SuperPDP enrollment link."

---

#### scell_onboarding_get_session

**Description:** Retrieve the current status and result of an onboarding session. Use this to poll for completion after the user has gone through the SuperPDP enrollment popup.

**Auth:** `pk_*` publishable key required

**Endpoint:** `GET /onboarding/sessions/{session_id}`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `session_id` | `string` | Onboarding session ID |

**Returns:** `OnboardingSession` (with `tenant` populated if `status: "completed"`)

**Example prompts:**
- "Check the status of onboarding session sess_01HXYZ."
- "Has the client completed their onboarding? Session is sess_abc123."
- "Poll session sess_xyz until it's completed."

---

#### scell_onboarding_superpdp_authorize

**Description:** Start the SuperPDP OAuth2 Authorization Code flow for a given onboarding session. Returns the `authorize_url` to open in a popup and the `state` parameter for CSRF protection. The partner must open `authorize_url` in a browser popup — SuperPDP then guides the user through company registration, KYB, and identity verification.

**Auth:** `pk_*` publishable key required

**Endpoint:** `POST /onboarding/superpdp/authorize`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `session_id` | `string` | Onboarding session ID from `scell_onboarding_create_session` |

**Returns:** `OnboardingAuthorizeResponse`

```typescript
OnboardingAuthorizeResponse {
  authorize_url: string;   // SuperPDP OAuth2 authorization URL — open this in a popup
  state: string;           // CSRF state parameter — must match on callback
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "authorize_url": "https://app.superpdp.com/oauth/authorize?client_id=xxx&state=abc123&redirect_uri=https://api.scell.io/onboarding/superpdp/callback",
  "state": "abc123xyz789"
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Get the SuperPDP authorization URL for onboarding session sess_01HXYZ."
- "Start the SuperPDP OAuth2 flow for session sess_abc so I can open the enrollment popup."
- "What URL should I open in a popup for the user to complete KYB? Session is sess_xyz."

---

#### scell_onboarding_superpdp_callback

**Description:** Complete the SuperPDP OAuth2 Authorization Code flow. After the user finishes enrollment in the SuperPDP popup, SuperPDP redirects to the callback URL with `code` and `state` parameters. Pass these to this tool along with the `session_id` to finalize enrollment. On success, Scell creates a new tenant and returns its profile.

**Auth:** `pk_*` publishable key required

**Endpoint:** `POST /onboarding/superpdp/callback`

**Required parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `session_id` | `string` | Onboarding session ID |
| `code` | `string` | Authorization code returned by SuperPDP in the callback URL |
| `state` | `string` | State parameter returned by SuperPDP (must match the `state` from authorize) |

**Returns:** `OnboardingCallbackResponse`

```typescript
OnboardingCallbackResponse {
  success: boolean;
  authorization_code?: string;  // The authorization code that was exchanged
  tenant?: TenantProfile;       // The provisioned tenant profile
}
```

```typescript
TenantProfile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email?: string;
  phone?: string;
  siret?: string;
  siren?: string;
  kybStatus?: string;
  environment?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
}
```

**Example response:**

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "authorization_code": "auth_code_superpdp_xyz",
  "tenant": {
    "id": "ten_01HNEW",
    "name": "Nouveau Client SAS",
    "email": "contact@nouveauclient.fr",
    "siret": "98765432100012",
    "siren": "987654321",
    "kybStatus": "verified",
    "environment": "production",
    "createdAt": "2026-04-07T10:15:00Z"
  }
}
```

**Example prompts:**
- "Complete the onboarding for session sess_01HXYZ using authorization code 'auth_xyz' and state 'abc123'."
- "The SuperPDP popup returned code='ABC' and state='XYZ' — complete the callback for session sess_abc."

---

## International Invoicing — Country-Based Identifier Rules

The `scell_create_invoice` tool supports invoices between parties of any nationality. The required identifier field depends on the party's country:

| Party country | Required field | Example |
|---|---|---|
| France (`FR`) | `siret` — 14-digit SIRET number | `"siret": "12345678901234"` |
| EU country (non-FR) | `vatNumber` — full EU VAT number | `"vatNumber": "BE0123456789"` |
| Non-EU country | `legal_id` + `legal_id_scheme` | `"legal_id": "12-3456789"`, `"legal_id_scheme": "US:EIN"` |

### Common `legal_id_scheme` values

| Country | Scheme | Example |
|---|---|---|
| USA | `US:EIN` | `12-3456789` |
| UK | `GB:CRN` | `12345678` |
| Canada | `CA:BN` | `123456789` |
| Australia | `AU:ABN` | `12345678901` |
| Switzerland | `CH:UID` | `CHE-123.456.789` |

### Example prompts by party nationality

French seller, French buyer:
```
"Create an invoice from Acme SAS, SIRET 12345678901234, 10 Rue de la Paix 75001 Paris France,
 to Buyer SA, SIRET 98765432100012, 5 Avenue des Champs 69001 Lyon France,
 for 10 consulting hours at 150 EUR/hour at 20% VAT."
```

French seller, Belgian buyer:
```
"Invoice Belgian client SPRL Entreprise, VAT BE0123456789, 15 Avenue Louise 1050 Bruxelles Belgium,
 for software license: 1 unit at 5000 EUR with 0% VAT (intra-EU B2B)."
```

French seller, US buyer:
```
"Invoice US client Acme Inc, EIN 12-3456789, 100 Main Street, New York NY 10001 USA,
 for consulting: 5 days at 1200 EUR/day, 0% VAT (export)."
```

---

## TypeScript Types — Complete Reference

All types are exported from `@scell/mcp-client`. Import them as:

```typescript
import type {
  ScellMcpConfig,
  McpServerConfig,
  McpClientConfig,
  Company,
  InvoiceLine,
  InvoiceInput,
  Invoice,
  CreditNote,
  CreditNoteInput,
  CreditNoteLine,
  CreditNoteStatus,
  Signer,
  SignatureInput,
  SignatureRequest,
  FiscalComplianceData,
  FiscalIntegrityReport,
  FiscalClosing,
  FiscalEntry,
  FiscalKillSwitchStatus,
  FiscalRule,
  FiscalAnchor,
  FiscalAttestation,
  ISCADocument,
  BillingInvoice,
  BillingUsage,
  BillingTransaction,
  StatsOverview,
  StatsMonthly,
  SubTenant,
  SubTenantInput,
  TenantProfile,
  TenantBalance,
  ToolResult,
  PaginatedResult,
  HealthCheckResponse,
  ApiKeyValidationResponse,
  OnboardingAuthorizeResponse,
  OnboardingCallbackResponse,
  OnboardingSession,
  OnboardingSessionInput,
  WebhookEventType,
  WebhookPayload,
} from '@scell/mcp-client';
```

### Configuration Types

```typescript
interface ScellMcpConfig {
  apiKey: string;                                          // Required. Your Scell.io API key.
  baseUrl?: string;                                        // Default: "https://api.scell.io/api"
  environment?: 'production' | 'staging' | 'development'; // Optional environment tag
  sandbox?: boolean;                                       // If true, appends /sandbox to baseUrl
}

interface McpServerConfig {
  command: string;              // "npx"
  args?: string[];              // ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-http", baseUrl]
  env?: Record<string, string>; // Injected env vars including X-Scell-API-Key
}

interface McpClientConfig {
  mcpServers: {
    scell: McpServerConfig;
  };
}
```

### Invoice Types

```typescript
interface Company {
  name: string;               // Company legal name
  siret?: string;             // 14-digit SIRET — required only for country=FR
  vatNumber?: string;         // EU VAT number (e.g. FR12345678901, BE0123456789)
  legal_id?: string;          // Non-EU legal identifier (e.g. "12-3456789")
  legal_id_scheme?: string;   // Scheme code (e.g. "US:EIN", "GB:CRN")
  address: string;            // Street address line
  postalCode: string;
  city: string;
  country: string;            // ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (FR, BE, DE, GB, US, ...)
  email?: string;
  phone?: string;
}

interface InvoiceLine {
  description: string;
  quantity: number;
  unitPrice: number;          // Excluding tax
  vatRate: number;            // Percentage (e.g. 20 for 20%)
  unit?: string;              // Unit of measure
  productCode?: string;       // Product/service reference code
}

interface InvoiceInput {
  // invoiceNumber is NOT a field — server-generated
  invoiceDate: string;        // ISO 8601
  dueDate: string;            // ISO 8601
  seller: Company;
  buyer: Company;
  lines: InvoiceLine[];
  currency?: string;          // ISO 4217, default "EUR"
  format?: 'factur-x' | 'ubl' | 'cii';
  notes?: string;
  purchaseOrderRef?: string;
  paymentTerms?: string;
}

interface Invoice {
  id: string;
  invoiceNumber: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'pending' | 'sent' | 'paid' | 'cancelled' | 'disputed';
  totalExcludingTax: number;
  totalVat: number;
  totalIncludingTax: number;
  currency: string;
  format: string;
  downloadUrl?: string;
  paidAt?: string;
  paymentReference?: string;
  paymentNote?: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}
```

### Credit Note Types

```typescript
type CreditNoteStatus = 'draft' | 'sent' | 'cancelled';

interface CreditNoteInput {
  invoiceId: string;
  reason: string;
  type: 'partial' | 'total';
  items?: Array<{
    invoiceLineId: string;
    quantity?: number;        // Partial quantity to credit
  }>;
}

interface CreditNoteLine {
  description: string;
  quantity: number;
  unitPrice: number;
  taxRate: number;
  total: number;
}

interface CreditNote {
  id: string;
  creditNoteNumber: string;
  invoiceId: string;
  status: CreditNoteStatus;
  type: 'partial' | 'total';
  reason: string;
  subtotal: number;
  taxAmount: number;
  total: number;
  currency: string;
  issueDate: string;
  items?: CreditNoteLine[];
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}
```

### Signature Types

```typescript
interface Signer {
  name: string;
  email: string;
  phone?: string;   // For SMS OTP authentication
  order?: number;   // Signing order for sequential workflows (1, 2, 3, ...)
  role?: string;    // Signer's title / role
}

interface SignatureInput {
  document: string;       // Base64-encoded document content
  filename: string;
  mimeType: string;
  signers: Signer[];
  signatureType?: 'simple' | 'advanced' | 'qualified';
  signatureLevel?: 'SES' | 'AES' | 'QES';
  expiresAt?: string;     // ISO 8601
  emailSubject?: string;
  emailMessage?: string;
  webhookUrl?: string;
  redirectUrl?: string;
}

interface SignatureRequest {
  id: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed' | 'expired' | 'cancelled';
  filename: string;
  signers: Array<Signer & {
    status: 'pending' | 'signed' | 'declined';
    signedAt?: string;
  }>;
  signingUrl?: string;    // Hosted signing page URL
  downloadUrl?: string;   // Available when status is "completed"
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  expiresAt?: string;
}
```

### Fiscal Compliance Types

```typescript
type FiscalComplianceStatus = 'CONFORME' | 'ALERTE' | 'NON_CONFORME';

interface FiscalComplianceData {
  closingCoveragePercent: number;
  chainIntegrityPercent: number;
  openIncidentsCount: number;
  overallStatus: FiscalComplianceStatus;
  lastIntegrityCheckAt: string | null;
  lastClosingAt: string | null;
  lastClosingDate: string | null;
  totalFiscalEntries: number;
  daysWithActivity: number;
  daysClosed: number;
}

interface FiscalIntegrityReport {
  isValid: boolean;
  entriesChecked: number;
  brokenLinks: number;
  details?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

interface FiscalClosing {
  id: string;
  closingDate: string;
  closingType: string;
  status: string;
  entriesCount: number;
  totalDebit: number;
  totalCredit: number;
  chainHash?: string;
  environment?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
}

interface FiscalEntry {
  id: string;
  sequenceNumber: number;
  entryType: string;
  fiscalDate: string;
  entityType?: string | null;
  entityId?: string | null;
  dataHash?: string;        // SHA-256 hash of entry data
  previousHash?: string;    // Hash of preceding entry
  chainHash?: string;       // Combined chain hash
  environment?: string;
  legalStatus?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
}

interface FiscalKillSwitchStatus {
  isActive: boolean;
  killSwitch: {
    id: string;
    isActive: boolean;
    activatedAt: string;
    reason: string;
    activatedBy: string;
    deactivatedAt?: string | null;
    deactivatedBy?: string | null;
  } | null;
}

interface FiscalRule {
  id: string;
  ruleKey: string;
  name: string;
  category: 'vat' | 'invoicing' | 'credit_note' | 'closing' | 'export';
  ruleDefinition: Record<string, unknown>;
  version: number;
  effectiveFrom: string;
  effectiveUntil?: string | null;
  legalReference?: string | null;
  description?: string | null;
  isActive: boolean;
  createdAt?: string;
}

interface FiscalAnchor {
  id: string;
  anchorType: string;
  sourceHash: string;
  anchorReference?: string | null;
  anchorProvider?: string | null;
  anchoredAt?: string | null;
  createdAt?: string;
}

interface FiscalAttestation {
  year: number;
  tenantName: string;
  softwareVersion: string;
  compliance: Record<string, unknown>;
  generatedAt?: string;
  certificateHash?: string;
}

interface ISCADocument {
  filename: string;         // e.g. "registre-mesures-isca-2026.pdf"
  content: ArrayBuffer;     // PDF binary
  generated_at: string;     // ISO 8601
}
```

### Billing Types

```typescript
interface BillingInvoice {
  id: string;
  invoiceNumber: string;
  period: string;           // e.g. "2026-03"
  totalHt: number;
  totalTax: number;
  totalTtc: number;
  status: string;
  currency: string;
  issuedAt?: string | null;
  dueDate?: string | null;
  paidAt?: string | null;
}

interface BillingUsage {
  period: string;
  invoicesCount: number;
  creditNotesCount: number;
  signaturesCount: number;
  totalCost: number;
  currency: string;
}

interface BillingTransaction {
  id: string;
  type: string;
  amount: number;
  currency: string;
  description?: string | null;
  reference?: string | null;
  status?: string | null;
  createdAt?: string | null;
}
```

### Statistics Types

```typescript
interface StatsOverview {
  totalInvoices: number;
  totalCreditNotes: number;
  totalRevenue: number;
  totalExpenses: number;
  activeSubTenants: number;
  currency: string;
}

interface StatsMonthly {
  month: string;            // e.g. "2026-03"
  invoicesCount: number;
  creditNotesCount: number;
  revenue: number;
  expenses: number;
}
```

### Tenant & Sub-Tenant Types

```typescript
interface TenantProfile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email?: string;
  phone?: string;
  siret?: string;
  siren?: string;
  kybStatus?: string;       // e.g. "pending", "verified", "rejected"
  environment?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
}

interface TenantBalance {
  credits: number;
  currency: string;
}

interface SubTenantInput {
  externalId?: string;
  name: string;
  siret?: string;
  siren?: string;
  email?: string;
  phone?: string;
  address?: {
    line1: string;
    line2?: string;
    postalCode: string;
    city: string;
    country?: string;
  };
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

interface SubTenant {
  id: string;
  externalId?: string | null;
  name: string;
  siret?: string | null;
  siren?: string | null;
  email?: string | null;
  phone?: string | null;
  address?: {
    line1: string;
    line2?: string;
    postalCode: string;
    city: string;
    country?: string;
  } | null;
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown> | null;
  createdAt?: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
}
```

### Result Types

```typescript
interface ToolResult<T> {
  success: boolean;
  data?: T;
  error?: string;
  errorCode?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

interface PaginatedResult<T> {
  items: T[];
  total: number;
  page: number;
  perPage: number;
  totalPages: number;
}
```

### API Response Types

```typescript
interface HealthCheckResponse {
  status: 'healthy' | 'degraded' | 'unhealthy';
  version: string;
  services: {
    database: boolean;
    cache: boolean;
    queue: boolean;
    signature: boolean;
    invoicing: boolean;
  };
}

interface ApiKeyValidationResponse {
  valid: boolean;
  tenant?: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    plan: string;
  };
  permissions?: string[];
  rateLimit?: {
    limit: number;
    remaining: number;
    reset: string;
  };
}
```

### Onboarding Types

```typescript
interface OnboardingAuthorizeResponse {
  authorize_url: string;    // SuperPDP OAuth2 authorization URL (open in popup)
  state: string;            // CSRF state — verify on callback
}

interface OnboardingCallbackResponse {
  success: boolean;
  authorization_code?: string;
  tenant?: TenantProfile;
}

interface OnboardingSession {
  id: string;
  status: 'pending' | 'authorized' | 'completed' | 'failed';
  tenant?: TenantProfile;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

interface OnboardingSessionInput {
  externalId?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
}
```

### Webhook Types

```typescript
type WebhookEventType =
  | 'invoice.created'
  | 'invoice.sent'
  | 'invoice.paid'
  | 'invoice.cancelled'
  | 'invoice.incoming.received'
  | 'invoice.incoming.validated'
  | 'invoice.incoming.accepted'
  | 'invoice.incoming.rejected'
  | 'invoice.incoming.disputed'
  | 'invoice.incoming.paid'
  | 'credit_note.created'
  | 'credit_note.sent'
  | 'credit_note.cancelled'
  | 'signature.created'
  | 'signature.signed'
  | 'signature.completed'
  | 'signature.expired'
  | 'signature.declined';

interface WebhookPayload<T = unknown> {
  event: WebhookEventType;
  timestamp: string;        // ISO 8601
  data: T;                  // Event-specific payload
  signature: string;        // HMAC-SHA256 for verification
}
```

---

## Programmatic Usage (Library Mode)

Use `@scell/mcp-client` as a library to generate configs programmatically:

```typescript
import {
  generateClaudeDesktopConfig,
  generateCursorConfig,
  generateVSCodeConfig,
  generateGenericConfig,
  generateConfigWithInstructions,
  getConfigPath,
  validateConfig,
  type ScellMcpConfig,
} from '@scell/mcp-client';

const config: ScellMcpConfig = {
  apiKey: 'tk_live_your_api_key_here',
  baseUrl: 'https://api.scell.io/api',  // optional
  environment: 'production',             // optional
  sandbox: false,                        // optional
};

// Validate before generating
const { valid, errors } = validateConfig(config);
if (!valid) {
  console.error('Config errors:', errors);
  process.exit(1);
}

// Generate for each IDE
const claudeConfig  = generateClaudeDesktopConfig(config);
const cursorConfig  = generateCursorConfig(config);
const vscodeConfig  = generateVSCodeConfig(config);
const genericConfig = generateGenericConfig(config);

// Get expected config file path (platform-aware)
const claudePath = getConfigPath('claude');  // ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/... on macOS
const cursorPath = getConfigPath('cursor');  // .cursor/mcp.json
const vscodePath = getConfigPath('vscode');  // .vscode/mcp.json

// Generate with inline tool comments (useful for documentation or debugging)
const withComments = generateConfigWithInstructions(config, 'claude');

// Write to file
const fs = require('fs');
fs.writeFileSync(claudePath, JSON.stringify(claudeConfig, null, 2), 'utf-8');
```

### `validateConfig` error messages

| Error | Cause |
|---|---|
| `"API key is required"` | No `apiKey` provided |
| `"API key must be a string"` | Non-string `apiKey` |
| `"API key appears to be too short"` | `apiKey` less than 10 characters |
| `"Base URL must be a string"` | Non-string `baseUrl` |
| `"Base URL must start with http:// or https://"` | Invalid `baseUrl` scheme |
| `"Environment must be one of: production, staging, development"` | Invalid `environment` value |
| `"Sandbox must be a boolean"` | Non-boolean `sandbox` |

---

## Example Prompts — Complete Guide by Category

### Health & Authentication

```
"Is the Scell.io API up right now?"
"Check if all Scell services are running before I start invoicing."
"Is my API key valid? What permissions does it have?"
"How many API requests do I have left in this window?"
```

### Electronic Invoicing

```
"Create an invoice for Acme Corp, SIRET 12345678901234, for consulting services:
 10 hours at 150 EUR/hour, 20% VAT. Invoice date today, due in 30 days."

"Create a UBL invoice for German company Deutsche GmbH, VAT DE123456789,
 Unter den Linden 10 10117 Berlin Germany,
 for 50 software licenses at 40 EUR each with 19% VAT."

"Create a Factur-X invoice for UK client, CRN 12345678,
 10 Downing Street London SW1A 2AA UK,
 for software development: 5 days at 800 EUR/day, 0% VAT (export)."

"List all unpaid invoices from the last 30 days."
"Show me all invoices with status 'sent' created in March 2026."
"Get the details of invoice inv_01HXYZ."
"Download invoice SCELL-202604-00001 as PDF."
"Download the XML Factur-X file for invoice inv_abc123."
```

### Electronic Signatures

```
"Send the attached contract for signature to john.doe@example.com."

"Create a signature request for this NDA:
 - First signer: Alice Martin, alice@company.com, order 1
 - Second signer: Bob Dupont, bob@company.com, order 2
 Both must sign sequentially. Expires in 14 days."

"Create a signature request with SMS OTP auth for Marie Dupont,
 email marie@dupont.fr, phone +33612345678."

"Check the status of signature request sig_01HABC."
"Has everyone signed? Show me signature request sig_xyz."
"Send a reminder to pending signers for signature request sig_abc."
"Cancel signature request sig_01HABC — client changed their mind."
"Download the signed document for request sig_01HABC."
```

### Account & Validation

```
"What is my current Scell credit balance?"
"Is SIRET 12345678901234 valid and active?"
"Validate VAT number BE0123456789 before creating an invoice."
"Check if DE123456789 is a valid German VAT number."
"Get the audit trail for invoice inv_01HXYZ."
"Show me all events for signature request sig_abc123."
```

### Fiscal Compliance

```
"Show me my fiscal compliance dashboard."
"Is my ISCA status CONFORME?"
"Check the integrity of the SHA-256 hash chain in my fiscal ledger."
"List the last 10 daily fiscal closings."
"Show me all fiscal closings for Q1 2026."
"Generate a fiscal attestation for year 2025."
"List all active fiscal VAT rules."
"Show fiscal rules for credit notes."
"Is the fiscal kill-switch currently active?"
"Download the ISCA measures register PDF."
"Get the ISCA technical dossier for our auditor."
"Download the ISCA self-attestation certificate."
```

### Credit Notes

```
"List all draft credit notes."
"List sent credit notes from March 2026."
"Show me all credit notes for invoice inv_01HXYZ."
"Create a total credit note for invoice inv_01HXYZ because of duplicate billing."
"Create a partial credit note on invoice SCELL-202603-00015:
 credit 3 units of line item line_abc (damaged goods)."
"Send credit note cn_01HXYZ to the buyer."
"How much can still be credited on invoice SCELL-202603-00015?"
"Delete draft credit note cn_draft123."
"Download credit note CN-SCELL-202604-00001 as PDF."
```

### Partner Onboarding

```
"Start an onboarding session for new client with CRM ID 'crm_user_42'."
"Get the SuperPDP authorization URL for session sess_01HXYZ so I can open the popup."
"Complete the onboarding: session is sess_01HXYZ, code is 'ABC123', state is 'XYZ789'."
"Check the status of onboarding session sess_abc123."
"Has my client finished their KYB in session sess_xyz?"
```

---

## Webhook Events Reference

All webhook events delivered to a configured `webhookUrl` follow the `WebhookPayload<T>` structure:

```json
{
  "event": "invoice.paid",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-07T15:30:00Z",
  "data": { ... },
  "signature": "hmac_sha256_..."
}
```

### Outgoing Invoice Events

| Event | Trigger |
|---|---|
| `invoice.created` | New invoice created |
| `invoice.sent` | Invoice submitted and assigned fiscal number |
| `invoice.paid` | Invoice marked as paid |
| `invoice.cancelled` | Invoice cancelled |

### Incoming Invoice Events

| Event | Trigger |
|---|---|
| `invoice.incoming.received` | Incoming invoice received from supplier |
| `invoice.incoming.validated` | Incoming invoice passed validation |
| `invoice.incoming.accepted` | Incoming invoice accepted by tenant |
| `invoice.incoming.rejected` | Incoming invoice rejected by tenant |
| `invoice.incoming.disputed` | Incoming invoice disputed |
| `invoice.incoming.paid` | Incoming invoice paid |

### Credit Note Events

| Event | Trigger |
|---|---|
| `credit_note.created` | Credit note created (draft) |
| `credit_note.sent` | Credit note sent to buyer |
| `credit_note.cancelled` | Credit note cancelled |

### Signature Events

| Event | Trigger |
|---|---|
| `signature.created` | Signature request created |
| `signature.signed` | One signer has signed |
| `signature.completed` | All signers have signed |
| `signature.expired` | Signature request expired |
| `signature.declined` | A signer declined |

---

## Common Error Patterns

### Authentication Errors

```json
{
  "error": "UNAUTHORIZED",
  "message": "Invalid or missing API key",
  "statusCode": 401
}
```

**LLM response:** Verify the API key is correct and starts with the right prefix. For fiscal/credit note tools, check that a `tk_*` tenant key is being used (not `sk_*`). For onboarding tools, a `pk_*` publishable key is required.

### Authorization Errors

```json
{
  "error": "FORBIDDEN",
  "message": "Tenant API key required for fiscal compliance tools",
  "statusCode": 403
}
```

**LLM response:** This tool requires a tenant key (`tk_live_*` or `tk_test_*`). The current key type does not have sufficient permissions.

### Validation Errors

```json
{
  "error": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
  "message": "Invoice date is required",
  "details": {
    "field": "invoiceDate",
    "rule": "required"
  },
  "statusCode": 422
}
```

**LLM response:** Re-examine the parameters and provide the missing or invalid fields.

### Rate Limit Errors

```json
{
  "error": "RATE_LIMITED",
  "message": "Too many requests",
  "retryAfter": "2026-04-07T15:00:00Z",
  "statusCode": 429
}
```

**LLM response:** Wait until `retryAfter` before retrying. Use `scell_validate_api_key` to check remaining rate limit.

### Not Found Errors

```json
{
  "error": "NOT_FOUND",
  "message": "Invoice not found",
  "statusCode": 404
}
```

**LLM response:** The resource ID does not exist. Verify the ID by listing resources first.

### Fiscal Constraint Errors

```json
{
  "error": "FISCAL_CONSTRAINT",
  "message": "Cannot delete a sent invoice (fiscal immutability)",
  "statusCode": 409
}
```

**LLM response:** Sent invoices and sent credit notes are immutable per French fiscal law (ISCA). To reverse a sent invoice, create a credit note instead.

### Server Errors

```json
{
  "error": "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR",
  "message": "An unexpected error occurred",
  "statusCode": 500
}
```

**LLM response:** Call `scell_health_check` to verify service status. If all services show healthy, retry the operation once. If the issue persists, contact support@scell.io.

---

## Migration Notes

### v1.9.0 — 2026-04-07

- Version bump to publish all SuperPDP onboarding changes to npm
- `VERSION` constant corrected in CLI (was hardcoded `1.2.0`)
- `ISCADocument` type now properly exported from `src/index.ts`

### v1.8.0 — 2026-04-07

- Version bump to publish SuperPDP OAuth2 onboarding tools to npm

### v1.7.0 — 2026-04-07

- Added SuperPDP OAuth2 onboarding section to `llms.txt` documentation

### v1.6.2 — 2026-04-07

- Added 3 new ISCA document download tools: `scell_download_measures_register`, `scell_download_technical_dossier`, `scell_download_self_attestation`
- Renamed NF525 → ISCA throughout codebase and documentation (total at time: 33 tools → now 37)

### v1.6.0 — 2026-04-07

- Invoice numbers are now **server-generated**. Clients no longer provide `invoice_number` as input.
- `siret` is now optional on `Company` — required only for French companies (`country=FR`)

### v1.5.0 — 2026-02-12

- International invoicing support: optional `siret`, EU `vatNumber`, non-EU `legal_id` + `legal_id_scheme` fields on `Company` type

### v1.4.0 — 2026-02-11

- Fixed tool count to 30 in generator comments
- Removed duplicate `--sandbox` flag in CLI help output

### v1.3.0 — 2026-02-11

- Corrected API key prefix documentation from `sk_*` to `tk_*`
- Updated tool count to match actual tools

### v1.2.0 — 2026-02-11

- Added 18 new MCP tools (total at time: 30 tools)
  - Signature: `scell_cancel_signature`, `scell_send_reminder`
  - System: `scell_health_check`, `scell_validate_api_key`
  - Fiscal Compliance (7 tools): `scell_get_fiscal_compliance`, `scell_check_fiscal_integrity`, `scell_list_fiscal_closings`, `scell_get_fiscal_attestation`, `scell_list_fiscal_entries`, `scell_get_kill_switch_status`, `scell_list_fiscal_rules`
  - Credit Notes (7 tools): `scell_list_credit_notes`, `scell_get_credit_note`, `scell_download_credit_note`, `scell_create_credit_note`, `scell_send_credit_note`, `scell_delete_credit_note`, `scell_get_remaining_creditable`
- Dual auth support: user keys (`sk_*`) and tenant keys (`tk_*`)

### v1.1.0 — 2026-02-10

- Added `--sandbox` CLI flag and `sandbox` config option
- Added all Fiscal Compliance types, Credit Note types, Billing types, Stats types, Sub-Tenant and Tenant types
- Updated `Invoice` type: added `disputed` status, `paidAt`, `paymentReference`, `paymentNote`
- Updated webhook events: added incoming invoice events and credit note events
- Added tools: `scell_get_balance`, `scell_validate_siret`, `scell_validate_vat`, `scell_get_audit_trail`

### v0.1.0 — 2026-01-24

- Initial release
- MCP configuration generator for Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code
- CLI tool `scell-mcp`
- TypeScript types for invoices, signatures, webhooks
- Programmatic API and config validation

---

## Getting an API Key

1. Sign up at [scell.io](https://scell.io)
2. Navigate to **Settings > API Keys** in the dashboard at [app.scell.io](https://app.scell.io)
3. Create a new API key:
   - **Tenant key** (`tk_live_*` / `tk_test_*`) — for full access including fiscal and credit notes
   - **Publishable key** (`pk_live_*` / `pk_test_*`) — for partner onboarding widgets only
4. Copy the key (shown only once at creation)
5. Use `tk_test_*` or `sk_test_*` for development and `tk_live_*` for production

---
